recommendations.title: Chuck
recommendations.overview: A drama inspired by the life of heavyweight boxer Chuck Wepner.

recommendations.title: My Salinger Year
recommendations.overview: A college grad takes a clerical job working for the literary agent of the renowned, reclusive writer J.D. Salinger.

recommendations.title: The Good Lie
recommendations.overview: A young refugee of the Sudanese Civil War who wins a lottery for relocation to the United States with three other lost boys. Encountering the modern world for the first time, they develop an unlikely friendship with a brash American woman assigned to

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Leo
recommendations.overview: Jaded 74-year-old lizard Leo has been stuck in the same Florida classroom for decades with his terrarium-mate turtle. When he learns he only has one year left to live, he plans to escape to experience life on the outside but instead gets caught up in
recommendations.director: Robert Smigel, Robert Marianetti, David Wachtenheim

recommendations.title: Once in a Lifetime
recommendations.overview: At Léon Blum High School in Créteil, France, a history teacher decides to have her weakest 10th grade class participate in a national history competition.

recommendations.title: Where the Tracks End
recommendations.overview: Georgina is a teacher determined to make a difference in the lives of the children she educates in the classroom of a wagon school in rural Mexico.

recommendations.title: Far from Men
recommendations.overview: A French teacher in a small Algerian village during the Algerian War forms an unexpected bond with a dissident who is ordered to be turned in to the authorities.

recommendations.title: Not One Less
recommendations.overview: Set in the People's Republic of China during the 1990s, the film centers on a 13-year-old substitute teacher, Wei Minzhi, in the Chinese countryside. Called in to substitute for a village teacher for one month, Wei is told not to lose any students.

recommendations.title: Ju-on: The Curse
recommendations.overview: When elementary school teacher Kobayashi investigates the absence of one of his young pupils from the classroom, he finds himself at the doorstep of an anonymous suburban house that harbours a horrible secret, and into which all who enter are doomed.
